name: 11"x11" Natural Weave Outdoor Back Cushion Cream - Threshold™
description:
Add a sophisticated charm to your seating space with this Natural Weave Outdoor Back Cushion from Threshold™. Made of 100% recycled polyester material with polyester filling, this back cushion offers plush comfort and extra support for a relaxed seating experience. The sewn-seam closure gives a neat finish, while the natural weave pattern in cream and beige helps create a cozy ambiance. Suitable for outdoor use, this UV-resistant cushion stays fresh season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
